hooks.command: if [ -d .crabcc ]; then crabcc index --refresh >/dev/null 2>&1; else echo 'crabcc: no index in this repo (run /crabcc-init)' >&2; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // ""'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // ""'); if [ -n "$cmd" ] && command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then crabcc shell record --command "$cmd" ${cwd:+--cwd "$cwd"} --session-id "$session_id" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^| )(rg|grep( -[a-zA-Z]+)?)\s+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]+|(^| )find\s+[^|]*-name\b' && echo 'hint: try `crabcc sym/refs/callers` — symbol-aware and ~10x cheaper on tokens (`crabcc --help` for the full surface)' >&2; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); chain=0; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh run list' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'sleep ' && chain=1; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh workflow run' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'sleep ' && chain=1; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[|;&[:space:]])gh (pr|issue|run|release|workflow|api) '; then if [ "$chain" = "1" ]; then echo 'hint(gh-chain): dispatch+poll pattern detected — replace with mcp__github__actions_run_trigger + actions_list/actions_get (no sleep race, no blocking watch, no stale-run-ID risk)' >&2; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr '; then echo 'hint(gh): gh pr → mcp__github__pull_request_read (method: get|get_diff|get_check_runs|get_review_comments) / merge_pull_request / pull_request_review_write' >&2; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh issue '; then echo 'hint(gh): gh issue → mcp__github__issue_read / issue_write' >&2; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh (run|workflow) '; then echo 'hint(gh): gh run/workflow → mcp__github__actions_list / actions_get / actions_run_trigger' >&2; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh api '; then echo 'hint(gh): gh api → prefer typed mcp__github__* tools (no manual jq pipelines)' >&2; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh release '; then echo 'hint(gh): gh release → mcp__github__get_latest_release / list_releases / get_release_by_tag' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // ""'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ] && command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then CRABCC_SESSION_ID="$session_id" crabcc read "$file" --mode=full --session-id "$session_id" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$file" in *.rs|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.py|*.go|*.java|*.kt|*.swift|*.cpp|*.cc|*.h|*.hpp) echo 'hint: `crabcc read --mode=auto` returns an outline stub on cache hit (~30x cheaper than full re-reads); the MCP `mcp__crabcc__read` tool exposes the same surface' >&2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0
